data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attribution model selection.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the attribution model selection (first touch/last touch/custom), but the provided evidence does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for this requirement, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that it has been implemented or is functioning as required. Therefore, the validation step is blocked due to a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of attribution model selection (first touch/last touch/custom).
